title: Rice Serving Spoon, Silicone Rice Paddle, Silica Gel Rice Spoon, Non Stick Rice Spoon, Kitchen Tool, for Rice, Mashed Potatoes, Stirring, Mixing, Black (bnfs)
features: 🍚 High Quality Materials: The rice serving spoon is made of high quality silicone for comfortable grip, sturdy and durable, not easily deformed and reusable.
🍚 Design: The rice serving spoon is ergonomically designed, has a non-slip grip and is heat resistant. The spoon is flexible and will not scratch your kitchen utensils.
🍚 Multifunction: The silicone rice paddle are suitable for rice, mashed potatoes, sushi rice and so on. They are easy to stir and mix, and are an indispensable tool in the kitchen.
🍚 Size: The silica gel rice spoon measures about 22.5*6.7*1.8cm, easy to clean and the hanging hole at the end reduces your storage space.
🍚 Quality Service: If you have any questions about our products, please contact us in time, we will solve the problem for you within 24 hours.
